categories.name: Heritage
categories.description: Discover the ancient soul of Madhya Pradesh through its UNESCO World Heritage sites, intricately carved temples, and legendary monuments that narrate tales of a glorious past.

categories.name: Palaces
categories.description: Step into royalty. Explore grand palaces and majestic forts where history meets architectural brilliance, offering grand settings for cinematic storytelling.

categories.name: Nature
categories.description: Immerse yourself in the pristine beauty of Satpuras and Vindhyas. From cascading waterfalls to tranquil rivers, MP offers breathtaking natural landscapes.

categories.name: wildlife
categories.description: The heart of India's wilderness. Capture the raw beauty of national parks where tigers roam free and bio-diversity thrives in its most authentic form.

categories.name: Spiritual
categories.description: Experience the divine energy of Madhya Pradesh. From ancient spiritual cities to serene river ghats, these locations offer peace and profound cinematic depth.

items.title: Khajuraho
items.description: Premium heritage location for film shooting in Madhya Pradesh, featuring ancient architectural marvels.

items.title: Orchha
items.description: A historic town on the banks of Betwa river, known for its grand palaces and chhatris.

items.title: Pachmarhi
items.description: Hill station in the Satpura Range, offering lush forests, waterfalls, and scenic landscapes.

items.title: Gwalior Fort
items.description: One of the most invincible forts in India, providing a spectacular backdrop for historical films.

items.title: Sanchi
items.description: The Great Stupa at Sanchi is one of the oldest stone structures in India and an important Buddhist monument.

items.title: Mandu
items.description: An ancient city celebrated for its fine Mughal architecture and romantic legends of Baz Bahadur and Roopmati.
